list.title: Your personal savings
list.description: Set target and date, and we go track how you dey go. Every goal na pot inside your one wallet, no be separate account.

frequency.label: How often you go contribute
frequency.hint: Contributions dey start small to build the habit and dey grow small small until you reach your target.

plan.daily: Start with <0></0> today and build up reach <1></1> over {{count}} days.
plan.weekly: Start with <0></0> this week and build up reach <1></1> over {{count}} weeks.
plan.monthly: Start with <0></0> this month and build up reach <1></1> over {{count}} months.

image.label: Picture (optional)
image.hint: Add photo of wetin you dey save for so the dream go dey alive.

summary.allocated: Wey you don put for savings

info.unallocated: For now you get <0></0> wey you never allocate. Assign am to one goal make your savings dey on track.

detail.notFound: We no fit find that goal.

deposit.title: Add money
deposit.description: Move money from your available balance go inside this allocation.
deposit.descriptionOnchain: Move money from your available balance go inside this goal on-chain vault. Deposit na free.

withdraw.title: Withdraw
withdraw.feeNote: Dem go collect {{fee}}% withdrawal fee on-chain. You go receive the amount after dem remove the fee.

plan.title: Contribution plan
plan.subtitle: {{cadence}} · dey grow small small
plan.allDone: You don complete every step for your plan. 🎉

keepGoing.daily: Continue every day. About <0>{{count}} days</0> of contributions remain make you reach your target.
keepGoing.weekly: Continue every week. About <0>{{count}} weeks</0> of contributions remain make you reach your target.
keepGoing.monthly: Continue every month. About <0>{{count}} months</0> of contributions remain make you reach your target.

vault.title: On-chain vault
vault.description: The money wey you allocate dey enter this vault for Monad. Dem dey collect {{fee}}% protocol fee for every withdrawal.

delete.title: Delete goal
delete.descEmpty: This one go close the goal permanently.
delete.descWithBalance: This one go return the full {{amount}} balance back to your available money and close the goal.
delete.descWithFee: This one go withdraw the full {{amount}} balance back to your available money (after dem remove the {{fee}}% withdrawal fee) and close the goal.

toast.streakDescription: Nice, that deposit dey count for your savings streak.

deposit.prompt: Your wallet na self-custodial. Connect am make you sign the deposit yourself.

withdrawal.prompt: Your wallet na self-custodial. Connect am make you sign the withdrawal yourself.

errors.unavailable: On-chain goal savings no dey available for this deployment.
